/usr/bin/gcc -fsanitize=address,undefined -fno-omit-frame-pointer -O3 -march=native -Wall -Wextra -Werror -fno-exceptions -g -fsanitize=address,undefined -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/test_simd_detection.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/test_simd_detection.dir/tests/test_simd_detection.c.o CMakeFiles/test_simd_detection.dir/src/rendering/pixel_ops.c.o -o test_simd_detection  -lm
